SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Service Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into between Acme Corp
("Provider"), hereinafter referred to as "Provider", and Globex Ltd
("Client"), hereinafter referred to as "Client".

1. SUBJECT

1.1. Provider shall render the cloud-hosting services described in clause 2.

1.2. Client shall pay the fees described in clause 3 in the amount of 12,000
(twelve thousand) USD per year, no later than 14 calendar days after each
invoice.

2. SCOPE OF SERVICES

2.1. Hosting environment as specified in section 4.

2.2. Support services as specified in section 5.

3. PAYMENT

3.1. Fees are due in the amount of 1,000 (one thousand) USD per month.

3.2. Late payment penalties — see clause 6.2 (which does not exist on purpose,
to test validate_references).

4. INFRASTRUCTURE

4.1. Bare-metal server in EU region.

5. SUPPORT

5.1. 24/7 support window.
